# SCORE Houston local mentoring routing

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Organization: SCORE Houston Local area: Greater Houston, Upper Gulf Coast, Southeast Texas, Southwest Louisiana Office or partner: SCORE Houston chapter

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns business planning, certification, formation during Ideation, Launch, Operations and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- Organization: SCORE Houston
- Local area: Greater Houston, Upper Gulf Coast, Southeast Texas, Southwest Louisiana
- Office or partner: SCORE Houston chapter
- ## BOSS routing summary
- Use when the user needs free mentoring, business-plan review, concept feedback, accountability, or a mentor before or alongside SBDC/APEX.
- ## Local service area
- SCORE Houston serves Greater Houston and surrounding Upper Gulf Coast and Southeast Texas communities.

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, SCORE Houston
- Link: <https://www.score.org/tx/houston/>

## Next handoff

Route to SCORE Houston or SCORE mentor request process. Ask user to prepare a one-page summary and top questions.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
